{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172134CDAC7D8FE514828A2580"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374065570239890227","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很有趣！它就像一部时光机，带我穿梭到古代中国的各个朝代，看那些历史人物在舞台上的精彩表演。书里还揭秘了很多有趣的历史细节，像“秦国星耀智囊团为何多是外籍人士”，让我大开眼界。而且，它的语言诙谐幽默，就像是在和朋友聊天一样，一点也不枯燥。我觉得它很像《明朝那些事儿》，都能让我们在轻松的阅读中了解历史。推荐给喜欢历史的小伙伴们！","text_exts":[{"e":136,"s":130,"text":"明朝那些事儿","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%98%8E%E6%9C%9D%E9%82%A3%E4%BA%9B%E4%BA%8B%E5%84%BF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773998494828A2580%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227374065570239890227%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227063025871128366093%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%98%8E%E6%9C%9D%E9%82%A3%E4%BA%9B%E4%BA%8B%E5%84%BF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715655036,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我越来越爱你，可不能够给我个永远不分离。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3WZcyTwGGeJ7ZIe3pcWNZGwuaAlH/Dj/yUqAYty1k2f","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8fe739b01e23491e8e07cc1f48845ba2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531055&x-signature=v8hVdhY%2BL%2B7g00PRphQnseBQ3a4%3D","user_id":"3457331929288494","user_name":"找回遗失的自我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3457331929288494","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":"    秦国星耀智囊团为何多是商鞅、张仪等外籍人士？汉武帝如何赚钱又烧钱？隋炀帝南巡开凿了大运河，西巡时又干了什么？李渊何以凭借3万兵马7年定天下？战术天才李存勖吃了哪些战略短板的亏？王安石如何成为靖康之变的背锅侠？胡惟庸为何必须死？崇祯是如何远程“帮倒忙”的？袁世凯为何策划了清末“PS门”事件？
……
历史就是一出你方唱罢我方登场的戏剧，这些熟悉的名字背后，不仅有跌宕起伏的故事，也浓缩了每个时代承袭、变革和发展的偶然性与必然性。
本书是《国家人文历史》杂志公众号的精华结集，以时间为脉络，以“变化”为核心，精选制度、经济、军事、战略、朝堂5大主题、53个有戏又有料的话题，由点着面地纵向梳理了古代中国多个领域的承袭与变革，以动态的思维挖掘其背后的逻辑与本质，不仅还原了一个个鲜活多元的大时代，道出成败兴衰之理，更以诙谐的语言、独特的视角、严谨的考证，勾勒了今天中国的疆域版图、文化思想、经济格局、风俗人情和法度制度等多个领域的历史脉络。
细节决定成败，格局决定结局。翻开本书，读懂古代中国的承袭与变革，就能读懂中国几千年的风云流转，更能读懂中国何以传承至今，历久弥新。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"国家人文历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_name":"看不够的中国史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#802828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476023072277941310","read_count":"65","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280618"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"59","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182494&x-signature=yTRPFkjkph3RER31DrcBDAGYr14%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172134CDAC7D8FE514828A2580"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16740,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":74},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512028157097296702","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值得反复观看的一本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749034418,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"给时间时间，让过去过去，让开始开始","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5UeGUuXQT8VcyGUAz+c+/faxW3hAB1CTApqQptDmEZ7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a559e8e33c344f4890a2e2afdcc450df~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530879&x-signature=njyJwoy8u9p68CAsUhAJylGJk0U%3D","user_id":"4310553384729384","user_name":"看月亮雾雾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4310553384729384","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":" 细节决定成败，格局决定结局。翻开本书，读懂古代中国的承袭与变革，就能读懂中国几千年的风云流转，更能读懂中国何以传承至今，历久弥新。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"国家人文历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_name":"看不够的中国史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#802828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476023072277941310","read_count":"65","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280618"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"59","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182494&x-signature=yTRPFkjkph3RER31DrcBDAGYr14%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"75"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172134CDAC7D8FE514828A2580"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52242,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":52},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257119003222147894","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对中国历史感兴趣的人有福了，这本书带我们看历史上的一些重要事件，并分析背后的原因，就如隋炀帝杨广南巡时开凿了大运河，北起京杭大运河的淮安，一直延伸到原长江入海口（今江苏扬州市），总长约1794公里。而在他西巡时，他采取了一系列政策和措施，以加强边疆的统治和保护，在西部地区修建了一系列军事设施和要塞，如北地城、交城等，以巩固西北边境的防御。同时，他还大力招募少数民族为官，以巩固边疆的统治和稳定局势，从而奠定了国土的安全防卫基础。","text_exts":[{"e":5,"s":1,"text":"中国历史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773998494828A2580%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227257119003222147894%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227063025871128366093%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689679789,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"徜徉书海，感叹精神之无垠。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0sE7ulcldFK9Vy79P0bbVA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3589306448","user_name":"归去了无痕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3589306448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":"
